Featured Projects

Building production-grade platforms that other engineers build on

Hero Project

Kubernetes Hosting Platform

Production-ready Kubernetes platform engineering project with GitOps (ArgoCD), HashiCorp Vault auto-init/unseal, NGINX Ingress, and essential cloud-native tooling. Enables instant application deployment with zero DevOps expertise required.

Key Engineering Challenges Solved

  • Single-node Kubernetes cluster with automatic initialization and configuration via self-hosted VM
  • GitOps workflows with ArgoCD for declarative application deployment
  • Secure secret management with HashiCorp Vault auto-init and unseal
  • Integrated tooling stack: NGINX Ingress, Redis, Kafka, PostgreSQL, and more

My Role & Contribution

Designed and built the platform foundation, integrated cloud-native tools, and created the automated provisioning system.

Kubernetes ArgoCD Vault NGINX Redis Kafka PostgreSQL Azure
Microsoft Marketplace
Hero Project

Enterprise AI Chat Platform

Production-grade conversational AI platform with self-hosted LLM infrastructure using vLLM for GPU inference, agentic AI framework with pre-built agents, RAG via ChromaDB, and comprehensive RBAC for enterprise security.

Key Engineering Challenges Solved

  • Self-hosted LLM infrastructure with vLLM for high-throughput, low-latency GPU inference
  • Agentic AI framework with pre-built agents, prompt libraries, and customizable workflows
  • Secure multi-tenant architecture with fine-grained RBAC and enterprise integration
  • RAG implementation with ChromaDB vector storage for enterprise knowledge base

My Role & Contribution

Designed and built the platform architecture, implemented the agentic AI framework, and integrated enterprise-grade security features.

vLLM PyTorch FastAPI PostgreSQL Redis ChromaDB RBAC
Open Source

Enterprise Identity Platform

Production-grade Identity Provider (IdP) implementing OpenID Connect (OIDC) and OAuth 2.0 with full multi-tenant isolation, RBAC, and JIT 2FA. Serves as the central authentication foundation that other services depend on for secure authentication and authorization.

Key Engineering Challenges Solved

  • Multi-tenant architecture with complete tenant isolation across independent identity domains
  • OAuth2 & OpenID Connect compliance (RFC 6749, RFC 8252) with three grant types: Authorization Code (Web), Device Code (Headless), Client Credentials (Server-to-Server)
  • Just-In-Time (JIT) 2FA enrollment with TOTP QR code setup and recovery codes
  • Session binding via _sso_sid claim in access tokens for revocation tracking and token correlation

My Role & Contribution

Designed and implemented the core OAuth2/OIDC authentication flows, multi-tenancy engine, RBAC permission resolution, and JIT 2FA system for enterprise-scale deployment.

Python Django OAuth2 OIDC JWT (RS256) PostgreSQL Redis BFF Session Pattern
GitHub Documentation

Notification Service Platform

Production backend notification system contributed to - FastAPI with Kafka-based event consumers, Protocol Buffers for efficient data serialization, and multi-channel delivery via Twilio and other providers.

Key Engineering Challenges Solved

  • Event-driven architecture with Kafka consumers for reliable, asynchronous message delivery
  • Protocol Buffers for efficient data serialization and cross-service communication
  • Multi-channel notification delivery via Twilio and multiple providers
  • Idempotent processing and retry mechanisms for guaranteed message delivery

My Role & Contribution

Contributed to the production backend system, implemented Kafka consumer logic, and optimized data serialization with Protocol Buffers.

Python FastAPI Kafka PostgreSQL MongoDB Twilio Protocol Buffers Docker
